overrides.override_summary: Post-term covenant not to compete may not be enforceable under California law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be free to operate competing businesses after termination

overrides.override_summary: General release for successor/transfer may be unenforceable (Corp Code 31512, B&P Code 20010)
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may preserve franchise law claims through renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: NH governing law may not be enforceable in CA
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchise law may apply instead of NH law

overrides.override_summary: Binding arbitration in Portsmouth NH may be subject to CA rules
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may be able to litigate/arbitrate in CA

overrides.override_summary: Waiver of punitive damages may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisees may claim punitive damages

overrides.override_summary: Max interest rate is 10% in California
overrides.why_it_matters: Matches FA rate; no practical change

overrides.override_summary: IL Franchise Disclosure Act Sections 705/19 and 705/20 provide termination/nonrenewal rights
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional statutory protections for IL franchisees

overrides.override_summary: General release not required as condition of renewal/transfer/sale (COMAR 02.02.08.16L)
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees need not waive claims for renewal or transfer

overrides.override_summary: Franchise fees deferred until franchisor satisfies material obligations
overrides.why_it_matters: Protects MD franchisees from prepaying for undelivered services

overrides.override_summary: Out-of-state litigation provisions may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees may litigate in MD

overrides.override_summary: Minimum 3-year limitations period from grant of franchise
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees have longer to bring claims

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination with 60 days to cure; 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly longer notice/cure periods than standard FA (vs 24h-60 days)

overrides.override_summary: Transfer consent must not be unreasonably withheld
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees have statutory protection against arbitrary transfer denials

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require litigation outside Minnesota
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees litigate in MN, not NH

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require liquidated damages, termination penalties, or judgment notes
overrides.why_it_matters: Late Development Fee ($50K) and Cure Period Extension Fee may not apply in MN

overrides.override_summary: General release prohibited (Minn Rule 2860.4400(D))
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees preserve all claims through renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require jury trial waiver
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees retain jury trial right

overrides.override_summary: Franchisor cannot use negotiation to impose less favorable terms than FDD
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisees protected from bait-and-switch negotiation

overrides.override_summary: Covenants not to compete may be unenforceable (NDCC 9-08-06)
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may be free to compete post-term

overrides.override_summary: General release as condition of renewal/transfer may be unenforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may preserve claims

overrides.override_summary: Out-of-state jurisdiction or arbitration may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may litigate in ND

overrides.override_summary: NH choice of law may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND law may apply instead

overrides.override_summary: Waiver of punitive damages may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees may claim punitive damages

overrides.override_summary: Jury trial waiver may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees retain jury trial right

overrides.override_summary: RI Franchise Investment Act (19-28.1-14) governs profit-sharing, noncompete, transfer
overrides.why_it_matters: RI state franchise law provides additional protections

overrides.override_summary: No disclaimer of reliance on FDD representations
overrides.why_it_matters: VA franchisees can rely on all FDD representations

overrides.override_summary: WI Fair Dealership Law prohibits termination without good cause
overrides.why_it_matters: Stronger termination protection than standard FA

overrides.override_summary: 90 days prior written notice; 60 days to cure (if cured, notice is void)
overrides.why_it_matters: WI franchisees get extended cure period and notice is voided if cured
